[[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Former shrine Rank]]: Village shrine. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Taisho, Osaka)|ja|産土神社 (大阪市大正区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Taisho, Osaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[Taisho Ward]], Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. Former shrine Rank: Village shrine. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Hirano, Osaka)|ja|産土神社 (大阪市平野区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Hirano, Osaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Nagayoshi Deto]], [[Hirano Ward]], Osaka City. Managed by [[Shiki Nagayoshi Shrines]]<ref>[http://www.shikinagayoshi-jinjya.org/kenmusya.html Shiki Nagayoshi Shrine], [http://www.jalan.net/travel-journal/000047446/], [http://mawarisute.blog.fc2.com/blog-entry-182.html]</ref>. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Higashi-Osaka)|ja|産土神社 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Higashi-Osaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Higashi-Osaka City]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Misaki)|ja|産土神社 (岬町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Misaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Misaki Town]], [[:en:Sennan District|Sennan District]], Osaka Prefecture. Former shrine Rank: Village shrine.
* {{ill|Kokawa Ubusuna Shrine|ja|粉河産土神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokawa Ubusuna Shrine|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kokawa|Kokawa]], [[Kinokawa City]], [[:en:Wakayama Prefecture|Wakayama Prefecture]]. A subordinate and tutelary shrine of [[Kokawa-dera]].<ref>[http://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=3010 Kokawa Ubusuna Shrine]</ref>

'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja).
* {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana, Osaka)|ja|産土神社 (大阪市此花区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana, Osaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[Konohana Ward]], [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Former shrine Rank]]: Village shrine. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Taisho, Osaka)|ja|産土神社 (大阪市大正区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Taisho, Osaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[Taisho Ward]], Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. Former shrine Rank: Village shrine. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Hirano, Osaka)|ja|産土神社 (大阪市平野区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Hirano, Osaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Nagayoshi Deto]], [[Hirano Ward]], Osaka City. Managed by [[Shiki Nagayoshi Shrines]]<ref>[http://www.shikinagayoshi-jinjya.org/kenmusya.html Shiki Nagayoshi Shrine], [http://www.jalan.net/travel-journal/000047446/], [http://mawarisute.blog.fc2.com/blog-entry-182.html]</ref>. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Higashi-Osaka)|ja|産土神社 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Higashi-Osaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Higashi-Osaka City]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ubusuna Shrine (Misaki)|ja|産土神社 (岬町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Shrine (Misaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Misaki Town]], [[:en:Sennan District|Sennan District]], Osaka Prefecture. Former shrine Rank: Village shrine.
* {{ill|Kokawa Ubusuna Shrine|ja|粉河産土神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokawa Ubusuna Shrine|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kokawa|Kokawa]], [[Kinokawa City]], {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|WD=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. A subordinate and tutelary shrine of [[Kokawa-dera]].<ref>[http://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=3010 Kokawa Ubusuna Shrine]</ref>
* {{ill|Ubusuna Hachiman Shrine|ja|産土八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ubusuna Hachiman Shrine|qq=}}
== Related Articles == * [[Special:Prefixindex/産土|List of articles beginning with "産土"]] * [[Ubusunagami]] * [[Ubusunayama Kofun]]
